sections_cited: section 34A of the Federal Excise Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Federal Excise Reference Application 55 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.658/2021 2. For hearing of main case 09.10.2025 This reference application is pending since 2021 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. The applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 34A of the Federal Excise Act, 2005. Judge Judge Amjad
